description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat and partially terracotta-tiled roof. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, poolside lounge chairs, a shaded pergola, and several mature trees and shrubs providing greenery and privacy. The house itself has large, rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically, and a mix of white and muted red exterior walls. There is a driveway leading to a detached garage or outbuilding, and paved walkways connect the main entrance to the street and garden areas. The front entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal steps, while the rear of the house opens onto a patio and pool area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional landscaping.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat and terracotta-tiled roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard within a fenced lot. The property features a detached garage, paved walkways, and lush greenery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the street side, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and a portion of the fenced yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the backyard with the swimming pool, lounge area, pergola, and extensive landscaping, as well as the rear facade with large windows and patio doors.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house, the detached garage, and the connection between the driveway and the backyard, with visible garden features and trees.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the garage/outbuilding, the paved driveway, and the side entry, with a clear view of the fence and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat door, minimal steps, no porch, and clean modern lines
